Interface RedisSerializationContext.RedisSerializationContextBuilder<K,V>

Enclosing interface:
RedisSerializationContext<K,V>
public static interface RedisSerializationContext.RedisSerializationContextBuilder<K,V>
Builder for RedisSerializationContext.
Since:
2.0
Author:
Mark Paluch, Christoph Strobl

      RedisSerializationContext.RedisSerializationContextBuilder<K,V> key(RedisSerializationContext.SerializationPair<K> pair)

      Parameters:
      pair - must not be null.
      Returns:
      this builder.
